releaseNotes: - Implemented a Plugin system.
- New Node type: Subflow for modular Scene Flows.
- Image compression tool can now convert a selectable subset of all images in a Project instead of always converting all.
- Possibility to configure a Preload Script (js / lua) that is ran before a Project is loaded by the player.
- Resource fetchers added that allow downloading resources and adding them as local resources instead of remote ones.
- Added the ability to set a custom engine version for Projects.
- Node Editor lets you select which Flow to edit and debug.
- Implemented Show in Editor in Resource View for quick navigation for Scripts, Layouts, flows and Sequences which will open the respective editor.
- The Editor uses way less threads and for loading Resources than before.
- The image compression tool now lets you select which images to compress.
- Scripts can now access the application settings via global Settings object.
- Added a search filter to the help topic tree in the help overlay.
- The global script function: include allows for loading Databse files.
- Resource Subtype is serialised so even if the file-path goes missing though exporting to a bundle, the type is preserved.
- Fixed adding Resource bundles and archives to the Resources.
- Project exports now correctly handle Resource bundles and archives.
- Various smaller fixes concerning the code editor.
- Filtered Resource views did not correctly filter folders.
- Fixed possible Script Editor crashes.
- Fixed adding a resource from a different drive on Windows.
- Fixed Project name fixing with special characters in the project name.
- Removed json from the list of Other Resources to be able to add them as Database resources.
- Fixed Side effect import statements in JS
